description_long: This object is a compact stack of trading cards, tightly held together by a beige rubber band around the middle. The front side reveals a Yu-Gi-Oh! card with detailed artwork, text, and a brownish-red border, while the back displays the iconic swirling pattern and KONAMI branding typical of Yu-Gi-Oh! cards. The edges of the stack are slightly uneven, indicating the cards are not perfectly aligned, and the corners show some minor wear. The rubber band is slightly twisted and appears to be the only closure mechanism keeping the cards together. The cards themselves are made of glossy, printed cardstock, giving the surface a semi-reflective finish. The overall appearance suggests this is a personal item, likely used for carrying or storing collectible cards.
description: A stack of Yu-Gi-Oh! trading cards bound by a beige rubber band, with visible artwork and branding on the front and a swirling pattern on the back.
description_view_0: The back of the card stack is visible, showing the classic Yu-Gi-Oh! swirling pattern and KONAMI logo, with the rubber band running horizontally.
description_view_1: A narrow side view reveals the thickness of the card stack and the tightness of the rubber band, with the layered edges of the cards visible.
description_view_2: The front of the stack displays a Yu-Gi-Oh! card with detailed artwork, text, and a brownish-red border, partially obscured by the rubber band.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the layered card edges and the rubber band, with a slight tilt in the stack.
attribute_brand_logo: The KONAMI logo is visible on the back of the top card, located in the upper left corner, in white text.
attribute_visible_wear_or_damage: Minor corner wear and slight edge unevenness are visible on the cards.
attribute_decorative_pattern: The back features a swirling vortex pattern typical of Yu-Gi-Oh! cards, and the front card has detailed fantasy artwork and text.
